name: Tide Whisper Selena
description: SS13 'Afterlight' reborn hero with an all-new tree-based Hero Trait system. Water/Terra caster; signature skill 'Dance of the Deep'. Base stats are not quantified in the patch notes, so baseModifiers are empty — her power comes from Terra skills, gear, and progression.

name: Berserker Rehan
description: Rage/Burst attack hero. Base stats not quantified in the notes.

name: Oracle Thea
description: Divine Realm / Blessing hero. Base stats not quantified in the notes.
